login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to manage identity and application access.
login.networkError: Network error, please try again later

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register Sakura Account for unified identity authentication.
register.nicknameHint2: Leave blank to use email prefix
register.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

register.networkError: Network error, please try again later

register.agreeRequired: Please accept the terms of service
register.agreeText: I have read and agree to the

consent.title: Authorization Request
consent.subtitle: Requesting access to your account
consent.scopeProfileDesc: Access your nickname, avatar and basic info

email.sendFailed: Failed to send email, please try again later
email.verificationSent: Verification code sent, please check your inbox
email.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired verification code, please request a new one
email.verifyRequired: Registration successful! Please verify your email before logging in
email.emailNotVerified: Email not verified. Please verify your email before logging in
email.invalidCode: Invalid code format, please enter a 6-digit verification code
email.resetPasswordSent: If the email is registered, you will receive a password reset email
email.resetTokenInvalid: Reset link is invalid or expired, please request a new one
email.resetPasswordSuccess: Password reset successfully, please login with your new password

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered email and we will send a password reset link
forgotPassword.sendFailed: Send failed, please try again later
forgotPassword.networkError: Network error, please try again later
forgotPassword.sentDesc: Please check your email and click the reset link. The link is valid for 30 minutes. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set your new password
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been updated and all devices have been logged out. Please log in with your new password.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.networkError: Network error, please try again later
resetPassword.invalidDesc: The reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new password reset.
